task: Fix BUG-001, BUG-013 in scanner.py and BUG-004, BUG-005 in events.py

BUG-001.description: Compose project name mismatch — now parses YAML 'name' field with dir_path.name fallback
changes: Added _read_compose_name() to parse top-level 'name' field from compose YAML
Updated _check_directory() to use _read_compose_name() or fallback to dir_path.name

BUG-004.description: Thread-safety in DockerEventsWorker — threading.Event + client lock
changes: Protected _client access with _client_lock in run(), stop(), and finally block

note: main_window.py references event_ocurred and error_ocurred on lines 275-276 — those need updating to event_occurred/error_occurred to match the renamed signals
